professional_summary: PhD researcher in computer vision and AI (ULB) with hands-on experience developing deep learning methods for 3D scene representation and reconstruction using Python, PyTorch and C++. Background in photonics supports tackling physics-driven imaging problems.

bullets: Conduct research in computer vision, machine learning, and neural rendering; develop methods for 3D scene representation and reconstruction.
Implement and evaluate research pipelines in Python and PyTorch; write scientific papers and technical reports.
Designed and developed sensing devices and engineering solutions for precision measurement systems.
Contributed to instrumentation, testing, and technical problem solving in R&D projects.

relevant_projects.name: NeRF Research
bullets: Worked on neural rendering and sparse-view 3D reconstruction.
Investigated robust scene representation methods under limited supervision.

Deep learning & computer vision research (NeRF, neural rendering, 3D reconstruction)
Implementation experience in Python and PyTorch
Experience writing scientific papers and technical deliverables
